'''鈭歷-f-v-dh''' ('''kavafvedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beam|beam]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-f-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beam|beam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-f-v-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kavafvedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivafvedhoko|thivafvedhoko]] || [[word:jivafvedhoko|jivafvedhoko]] || [[word:shivafvedhoko|shivafvedhoko]] || [[word:kivafvedhoko|kivafvedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvafvedhoko|thuthuvafvedhoko]] || [[word:jujuvafvedhoko|jujuvafvedhoko]] || [[word:shushuvafvedhoko|shushuvafvedhoko]] || [[word:kukuvafvedhoko|kukuvafvedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvafvedhoko|thuvafvedhoko]] || [[word:juvafvedhoko|juvafvedhoko]] || [[word:shuvafvedhoko|shuvafvedhoko]] || [[word:kuvafvedhoko|kuvafvedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvafvedhoko|thuvafvedhoko]] || [[word:juvafvedhoko|juvafvedhoko]] || [[word:shuvafvedhoko|shuvafvedhoko]] || [[word:kuvafvedhoko|kuvafvedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevafvedhoko|thevafvedhoko]] || [[word:jevafvedhoko|jevafvedhoko]] || [[word:shevafvedhoko|shevafvedhoko]] || [[word:kevafvedhoko|kevafvedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovafvedhoko|thothovafvedhoko]] || [[word:jojovafvedhoko|jojovafvedhoko]] || [[word:shoshovafvedhoko|shoshovafvedhoko]] || [[word:kokovafvedhoko|kokovafvedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovafvedhoko|thovafvedhoko]] || [[word:jovafvedhoko|jovafvedhoko]] || [[word:shovafvedhoko|shovafvedhoko]] || [[word:kovafvedhoko|kovafvedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovafvedhoko|thovafvedhoko]] || [[word:jovafvedhoko|jovafvedhoko]] || [[word:shovafvedhoko|shovafvedhoko]] || [[word:kovafvedhoko|kovafvedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vafvedhoko|th忙vafvedhoko]] || [[word:j忙vafvedhoko|j忙vafvedhoko]] || [[word:sh忙vafvedhoko|sh忙vafvedhoko]] || [[word:k忙vafvedhoko|k忙vafvedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavafvedhoko|thathavafvedhoko]] || [[word:jajavafvedhoko|jajavafvedhoko]] || [[word:shashavafvedhoko|shashavafvedhoko]] || [[word:kakavafvedhoko|kakavafvedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavafvedhoko|thavafvedhoko]] || [[word:javafvedhoko|javafvedhoko]] || [[word:shavafvedhoko|shavafvedhoko]] || [[word:kavafvedhoko|kavafvedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavafvedhoko|thavafvedhoko]] || [[word:javafvedhoko|javafvedhoko]] || [[word:shavafvedhoko|shavafvedhoko]] || [[word:kavafvedhoko|kavafvedhoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavafvedhithi|shavafvedhithi]] || [[word:shavafvedhiji|shavafvedhiji]] || [[word:shavafvedhishi|shavafvedhishi]] || [[word:shavafvedhiki|shavafvedhiki]]
